title: pelargonium × reformatum
intro: Pelargonium × reformatum is a hybrid species of the pelargonium genus, often referred to as a type of geranium plant. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Pelargonium × reformatum include relieving digestive issues, such as stomach ulcers and diarrhea, as well as reducing the severity of colds and flu due to its antimicrobial properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and extracts for consumption, with some cultures also using its leaves in traditional remedies and skincare products.
